arts.ttl: Tottenham’s kids rescue Postecoglou and sink Elfsborg on way into last 16
arts.athr: Jacob Steinberg at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: This was a rare case of Tottenham turning an injury into a positive. The loss of Radu Dragusin was Dane Scarlett’s cue. Recalled from a disappointing loan spell at Oxford United earlier this month, the 20-year-old striker came on for Dragusin and set Spurs on course to victory over Elfsborg when he headed in his first goal for his boyhood club. It has been almost five years since Scarlett made his debut. He was an unlikely saviour but Ange Postecoglou was not complaining. There was more joy when another substitute, the 19-year-old winger, Oyindamola Ajayi, came on to score on his debut, then when Mikey Moore made it 3-0 with his first professional goal. Spurs had secured their place in the knockout phase. There was relief at avoiding two extra playoff games. Continue reading...

arts.sum: The Europa League offers Tottenham a chance to get their season back on track

arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur booked their berth in the Europa League's last 16 with a 3-0 victory over Swedish side Elfsborg on Thursday

arts.ttl: Tottenham 3-0 Elfsborg: Highlights, man of the match, stats as academy graduates steal the show
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur rely on academy stars to seal a win over Elfsborg and a top-eight finish in the Europa League, with goals from Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore.

arts.ttl: Who can Tottenham face in Europa League last-16 knockout stage?

arts.ttl: Academy trio help Spurs seal Europa League last-16 spot
arts.sum: Academy graduates Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore scored their first Spurs goals to secure their side's place in the Europa League last 16 with a 3-0 win over Elfsborg at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.
